fixture.prompt: Create a talent draw system triggered by F4. When the player presses F4, draw 3 candidates from a weighted talent pool, show a card selection UI, let the player confirm one talent, apply it immediately, and make selected talents not appear again in future draws during the same session.

display.title: Choose Your Talent
display.description: Select one of the following talents

display.title: Choose Your Talent
display.description: Select one of the following talents

connections.purpose: Start the bounded selection flow from the admitted trigger.
Provide weighted candidate data and pool-state inputs.
Realize the confirmed current-feature outcome without widening selection_flow ownership.
Project draw results into the current-feature selection UI.
Return the player's confirmed choice to the selection flow.

patternHints.rationale: selection_pool uses one local input trigger surface.
selection_pool keeps a feature-owned weighted candidate pool.
selection_pool commits one confirmed candidate per draw and emits a normalized outcome request.
selection_pool realizes confirmed outcomes through a bounded host-native outcome module.
selection_pool exposes a current-feature selection modal surface.

knownLimitations: Generator produces real content but may need refinement for production use
Selection outcome realization is still partially deferred when it would require broad generic modifier/KV synthesis
UI card interaction logic is generated but may need manual tuning
Pool state persistence is session-scoped only
Host write readiness gate requires hostRoot to be set (defaults to not ready)
